text:
The action was approved by the cabinet on 3 April,
despite the grave reservations of some members concerning
Ohn's well-known pro-Soviet bias.

Comment
U Ohn has never concealed his pro-Commu-
nist inclinations, which have been repeatedly
demonstrated by his behavior in Moscow. In contrast, U Thant--
a devout Buddhist--is an older, more mature person who has
been regarded as an important moderating influence on the im-
pulsive premier
